info.title: Qualys API
info.description: Qualys Security Platform API. Covers VMDR (Vulnerability Management, Detection and Response), WAS (Web Application Scanning), and Global AssetView APIs. The classic API (v2) uses XML request/response format with Basic authentication. The newer QPS APIs (v2.0/v3.0) use XML ServiceRequest format. All endpoints require authentication.

requestBody.description: action=launch with scan parameters (title, ip, asset_groups, option_title, etc.)

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication with Qualys platform username and password

tags.name: Host Assets
tags.description: Host asset management and VM detections
